Package javashooter.gameobjects

Class FallingStar

java.lang.Object
javashooter.gameobjects.GameObject
javashooter.gameobjects.FallingStar
public class FallingStar extends GameObject
Convenience Class subclassing GameObject, pre-creationg a subclass of Artist that draws a circular white point. The javashooter.controller is left undefined, the javashooter.collider as well. FallingStar object rarely need a javashooter.collider so no generateColliders method is implemented.

  • Constructor Details

    • FallingStar

      public FallingStar(String id, Playground playground, double x, double y, double vx, double vy, Color color, double rad)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      id - object name
      javashooter - .playground Level instance
      x - posx
      y - posy
      vx - speedx
      vy - speedy
      color - Star color, see java.awt.Color
      rad - radius of the star
